displayName: Complete at least X Discretionary Assignment(s)
descriptions: Volunteering is mandatory!
High Command reminds you that discretionary means someone else already exercised discretion for you.
These assignments are optional in the same sense that breathing during a firefight is optional.

displayName: At most 1 call-in for Supply stratagems
descriptions: Liberation day parades have priority access to Super Earth stockpiles.
Supply officers report your ammunition has been reassigned to a more photogenic battlefield.
Quartermaster review has approved one resupply, and only because paperwork insisted.

displayName: At least 5 arrows in stratagem code
descriptions: More arrows, more democracy. Simpler codes are for traitors.
The Ministry has ruled that any citizen can press three buttons, so you will prove you are above average.
The Ministry of Complexity assures us longer input strings dramatically improve morale.

displayName: At most 5 arrows in stratagem code
descriptions: Due to cuts to basic training, we've simplified stratagems for the average super-citizen.
Budget efficiency has reduced strategic doctrine to gestures even recruits can remember.
Certain officials fear some Helldivers were thinking too hard during combat, so inputs have been shortened.
Logistics under review due to budgetary excellence.
The bean-counters have won another battle for freedom. Ammunition lost that battle.
Resupply has been postponed until Accounting confirms you deserved the first magazine.

displayName: At most level 12 on primary weapons
descriptions: Ministry of Defense demand our existing stockpiles be depleted before resupplies are dispatched.
Field testing of obsolete rifles continues until the rifles or the field give out.
Procurement assures us old weapons are still cutting-edge if you stop measuring.

displayName: At most 15 horizontal recoil on primary weapons
descriptions: Freedom comes with specifications. Make sure your weapon meets the standards set by the Ministry of Science.
The Ballistics Office insists your shots spread liberty, not sideways embarrassment.
Scientists have calculated the ideal patriotic drift pattern, and your rifle will comply.

displayName: At most 20 vertical recoil on primary weapons
descriptions: Freedom comes with specifications. Make sure your weapon meets the standards set by the Ministry of Science.
The Ministry of Science would prefer your muzzle rise stop challenging low-flying aircraft.
Excessive vertical recoil has been classified as unauthorized anti-orbital fire.

displayName: At least 50 ergonomics on primary weapons
descriptions: Freedom comes with specifications. Make sure your weapon meets the standards set by the Ministry of Science.
Medical auditors have objected to rifles that dislocate shoulders faster than enemies.
A weapon must feel good in the hand if it is to look good in the recruitment reel.

description: Eagle-1 is on 2 days C-01 Permitted Leave - No air support.
descriptions: Eagle-1 is on 2 days C-01 Permitted Leave - No air support.
Air superiority has been temporarily reassigned to a ceremonial flyover for select Permacura stakeholders.
The pilot filed a perfectly legitimate complaint about all the screaming.

displayName: No use of the same stratagem twice in a row.
descriptions: Ministry of Truth reports no known deficiencies in Super Destroyer capabilities.
Repeating successful tactics may imply our other stratagems are inferior, which is sedition.
Variety is encouraged so every branch feels equally responsible for the chaos.
After unsubstantiated reports of stim dependency, squad members are to handle your stims for accountability.
Medical review has determined self-care is dangerously close to individualism.
To prevent abuse, all stimulants will now be administered by a witness and at least one clipboard.
Current HUD blackouts are part of a Super Earth combat readiness drill.
Interface support has been suspended so your instincts may receive additional democratic exercise.
Strategic planners assure you situational awareness is strongest when unsupported by situational information.
Ministry of Unity orders require demonstration of sufficient camaraderie before resupply.
Ammunition will only be issued after a brief but sincere display of state-approved affection.
Under new DEI regulations, Quartermaster morale doctrine now measures trust in hugs per minute.
Ministry of Unity have commissioned a wartime documentary.
Every objective milestone must be celebrated for archival footage and investor confidence.
Visible enthusiasm has been ruled tactically equivalent to discipline.

displayName: Celebration emote after slaying Bile Titans and Dragon Roaches
descriptions: Ministry of Defence is trialing squad limb-checks in post-engagement scenarios.
Terminid kills of suitable spectacle now require a brief morale dance to verify joint integrity.
After-action procedure mandates visible confidence whenever something huge stops moving.

displayName: Celebration emote after shutting down Tanks and Factory Striders
descriptions: Ministry of Unity inform us this will curtail any further instances of post-combat inefficiency.
Automaton armor kills must be followed by a tasteful victory gesture for workforce motivation.
Military psychologists believe mechanical adversaries are most defeated when mocked immediately.

displayName: Celebration emote after obliterating Harvesters and Stingrays
descriptions: Ministry of Unity inform us this will prevent further instances of squid mind-control.
Illuminate contacts must be followed by celebratory motions to shake out residual treacherous thoughts.
Psychological Operations recommends immediate victory posing after vaporizing anything suspiciously elegant.
